title: UBY Time JSON Record
description: JSON Schema for JSON-safe UBYTime records emitted by uby-time 0.1.0, aligned with UBY Cross-scale Time Labeling Specification Working Draft 0.1.0.

uby_value.description: UBY value in years since the Big Bang reference epoch. Serialized as a decimal string to avoid JSON floating point precision loss.

uby_version.description: UBY specification version used to produce this record.

model_version.description: Cosmological model identifier. Required by validation policy for Level 2 and Level 3 records, but nullable at schema level for Level 1 records and partially specified interchange data.

source_time.description: Original source time value, such as an ISO 8601 timestamp, Julian Date, astronomical year, BC year, or redshift.

source_system.description: Source time system name, such as ISO8601, JulianDate, AstronomicalYear, HistoricalBC, or CosmologicalRedshift.

rounding_rule.description: Rounding or quantization rule used when producing the UBY value.

generated_by.description: Implementation identifier that generated this record.

anchor_id.description: Identifier of the Level 1 anchor used for civil-time alignment.

anchor_jd.description: Julian Date of the anchor, serialized as a decimal string.

anchor_uby.description: UBY value of the anchor, serialized as a decimal string.

confidence_level.description: Optional confidence level in the closed interval [0, 1], serialized as a decimal string.

interval_start_uby.description: Optional lower bound of a UBY interval.

interval_end_uby.description: Optional upper bound of a UBY interval.

uncertainty_kind.description: Optional uncertainty interpretation, such as symmetric, interval, model, observational, or propagated.

propagation_note.description: Optional note describing conversion path, model assumptions, or uncertainty propagation.

ubyExpression.description: Loose expression-level pattern for interchange metadata. Full parsing is performed by the reference parser, not by this record schema.

examples.propagation_note: iso_to_uby converter=stdlib-datetime; stdlib fallback is not intended for leap-second-sensitive timing
